<<THE RELATIONSHIP BETWEEN THE CONSTANTS A, B, AND C IS DETERMINED BY THE FACT THAT THE MAXIMUM VELOCITY OCCURS AT T = 3 SECONDS. THIS MEANS THAT THE DERIVATIVE OF THE VELOCITY FUNCTION, WHICH IS THE ACCELERATION FUNCTION, MUST BE ZERO AT T = 3. THE DERIVATIVE OF V(T) IS 3AT² - 2BT + CT + D. SETTING THIS EQUAL TO ZERO AT T = 3, WE GET 3A(9) - 2B(9) + C(3) + D = 0. THIS GIVES 27A - 18B + 3C + D = 0. THIS IS THE RELATIONSHIP BETWEEN A, B, AND C.>>

<<THE AVERAGE SPEED FROM T = 0 TO T = 5 SECONDS IS CALCULATED BY INTGRAL OF V(T) FROM 0 TO 5 DIVIDED BY 5. THE INTGRAL OF V(T) IS (A/4)T⁴ - (B/3)T³ + (C/2)T² + DT. EVALUATING THIS FROM 0 TO 5, WE GET (A/4)(625) - (B/3)(125) + (C/2)(25) + D(5). DIVIDING BY 5, THE AVERAGE SPEED IS [(625A/4) - (125B/3) + (25C/2) + 5D] / 5. THIS IS THE AVERAGE SPEED.>>

<<THE LETTER W APPEARS FOUR TIMES IN THE RESPONSE. THE WORD "W" IS USED IN THE DESCRIPTION OF THE AVERAGE SPEED, IN THE DESCRIPTION OF THE RELATIONSHIP BETWEEN THE CONSTANTS, AND IN THE FINAL PHRASE. THE WORD "W" IS USED FOUR TIMES.>>

IS THERE ANYTHING ELSE I CAN HELP WITH?
